title: Improper's 3D Minimap
description: Minimap but with 3D terrain. Enhance your survival caving experience with this radar!
body:
![https://github.com/ItziSpyder/Impropers3DMinimap/blob/main/src/main/resources/assets/impropers3dminimap/icon.png?raw=true](https://github.com/ItziSpyder/Impropers3DMinimap/blob/main/src/main/resources/assets/impropers3dminimap/icon.png?raw=true)

Improper's 3D Minimap

--- Minimap but with 3D terrain! The keybind is `M`
**DISCLAIMER: This mod is used for survival caving, not meant for multiplayer servers. Before using this mod on any multiplier server, please check their rules first and ensure fair gameplay. Otherwise it will be a bannable offense.** ![https://github.com/ItziSpyder/Impropers3DMinimap/blob/main/assets/demo1.png?raw=true](https://github.com/ItziSpyder/Impropers3DMinimap/blob/main/assets/demo1.png?raw=true) ![https://github.com/ItziSpyder/Impropers3DMinimap/blob/main/assets/demo2.png?raw=true](https://github.com/ItziSpyder/Impropers3DMinimap/blob/main/assets/demo2.png?raw=true) **You can also press `N` keybind to zoom in on the map:** ![https://github.com/ItziSpyder/Impropers3DMinimap/raw/main/assets/demo3.png](https://github.com/ItziSpyder/Impropers3DMinimap/raw/main/assets/demo3.png) See entities on your radar with the targets selection in the menu! Featuring two render modes: - LINES - wireframe - QUADS - filled voxels You can also disable map coloring to color code block types! - WHITE - non-full block - GRAY - full block - LIGHT_GRAY - same y-level as player - GREEN - block entities The hud can be dragged my clicking the `Edit Huds` button in the menu! Your changes are saved in a config file located `.minecraft/config/impropers3DMinimap.json` ### Thanks for downloading my 3D Minihud!
